issues: The draft describes this as a 'Centennial Cup playoff series' but the OCR clearly identifies it as the 'Tier 2 western final series' — this is the Abbott Cup (western final), NOT the Centennial Cup final. The Centennial Cup final was against the Humboldt Broncos in May 1987, but this game is dated April 23, 1987, placing it in the Abbott Cup western final round.
The draft omits other Sockeyes goal scorers (Dave Tomlinson, Mike Claringbull, Rob Clarke) who are named in the OCR.

The draft headline 'Sockeyes Win In Overtime' is not confirmed by the OCR — the OCR only shows 'series lead' as a fragment, suggesting the actual headline may differ. No clear full headline is present in the OCR.

The draft says the series lead gave Richmond a '2-1 series lead in the best-of-seven Tier 2 western final' — this part is accurate — but calling it a 'Centennial Cup playoff series' in the short description is misleading and factually wrong for this stage of play.
review.correctedDescriptionShort: Tony Bobbitt scored in overtime to give the Richmond Sockeyes a 4-3 win over the Humboldt Broncos, taking a 2-1 lead in the Tier 2 western final (Abbott Cup) series.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: Tony Bobbitt scored at 1:04 of overtime to lift the Richmond Sockeyes to a 4-3 victory over the Humboldt Broncos in a Tier 2 western final (Abbott Cup) junior hockey playoff game in Humboldt, Saskatchewan on Wednesday night. Dave Tomlinson, Mike Claringbull, and Rob Clarke also scored for Richmond, who were outshot 39-23 and trailed for much of the game. The win gave the Sockeyes a 2-1 lead in the best-of-seven series, with game four scheduled for Richmond on Saturday.
review.notes: The OCR fragment "series lead" at the top is likely the tail end of a headline, but the full headline text is not recoverable from the OCR. The draft headline "Sockeyes Win In Overtime" is unconfirmed. Most critically, the draft mislabels the series as the Centennial Cup — on April 23, 1987, Richmond was playing the Abbott Cup (Tier 2 western final) against Humboldt, not the Centennial Cup final (which came in May 1987). The OCR itself correctly labels this as the "Tier 2 western final series."
